title: bug: try_recv Disconnected not distinguished from Empty in event drain
description: main.rs event drain uses Err(_) => break for both TryRecvError::Empty and TryRecvError::Disconnected. If background task exits without sending StatusChanged(Disconnected) (e.g. unexpected panic path), UI stays stuck on prior status. Fix: match Disconnected arm and synthesize StatusChanged(Disconnected) to the UI.
